name: suscripcion-rcv
description: Plataforma de suscripción RCV — La Mundial de Seguros

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "blue,green" --kill-others-on-fail "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server/src/index.js
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix frontend
